cmd_desc_flow_list: Lists all available flows in the workspace
cmd_desc_flow_run: Executes a flow directly, bypassing the LLM
cmd_desc_flow_status: Shows the latest execution log of a flow
cmd_desc_auto_automation_get_screen_size: Returns the screen resolution (width x height).
cmd_desc_auto_automation_click_text: Find text on screen using OCR and click it.
cmd_desc_auto_automation_scroll: Scroll wheel at (x, y) — positive=up, negative=down.
cmd_desc_auto_automation_drag: Click-and-drag from one position to another.
cmd_desc_auto_automation_type_text: Simulate keyboard typing of a text string.
cmd_desc_auto_automation_press_key: Press and release a single key (enter, esc, f5...).
cmd_desc_auto_automation_focus_window: Bring a window to foreground by title.
cmd_desc_auto_automation_get_browser_tab: List all open browser tabs via Windows Accessibility API. Use before focus_browser_tab.
cmd_desc_auto_automation_focus_browser_t: Click a browser tab by title fragment (no coordinates needed).
cmd_desc_auto_automation_read_window_con: Read the UI control tree of any application window.
cmd_desc_auto_browser_open_url: Navigate the browser to a URL.
cmd_desc_auto_browser_go_back: Navigate back to the previous page.
cmd_desc_auto_browser_get_page_text: Read all visible text from the current page.
cmd_desc_auto_browser_get_links: List all hyperlinks on the page.
cmd_desc_auto_browser_click_element: Click an element by visible text or aria-label.
cmd_desc_auto_browser_type_in_field: Fill a form field by label/placeholder and optionally press Enter.
cmd_desc_auto_browser_scroll: Scroll the page up or down.
cmd_desc_auto_browser_press_key: Press a keyboard key in the browser.
cmd_desc_auto_browser_run_js: Execute JavaScript code on the page.
cmd_desc_auto_browser_screenshot: Take a viewport screenshot for vision analysis.
cmd_desc_auto_browser_list_tabs: List all open tabs in the browser (useful for CDP mode).
cmd_desc_auto_browser_switch_tab: Switch focus to a specific tab by its ID.
cmd_desc_auto_browser_new_tab: Open a new tab and navigate to a URL.
cmd_desc_auto_dashboard_get_backend_stat: Verifies if the AI backend (Ollama, Kobold, or Cloud) is online and ready.
cmd_desc_auto_dashboard_get_full_dashboa: Returns a complete report of all hardware resources and AI backend status.
cmd_desc_auto_dashboard_get_gpu_status: Returns the video card (GPU) status, including VRAM usage and thermal/computational load.
cmd_desc_auto_dashboard_get_system_resou: Returns a summary of system CPU and RAM usage.
cmd_desc_auto_executor_run_python_code: Execute Python safely in AST sandbox.
cmd_desc_auto_executor_execute_backgroun: Run shell commands in background for long tasks.
cmd_desc_auto_executor_execute_slash_com: Executes an HDCS direct slash command.
cmd_desc_auto_executor_get_battery_statu: Device battery level and charging state.
cmd_desc_auto_executor_read_file: Read a file content by line range.
cmd_desc_auto_executor_write_file: Write or create a file (overwrite or append).
cmd_desc_auto_executor_patch_file: Surgically replace a text block inside a file.
cmd_desc_auto_flows_list_flows: List all saved flows with their status and trigger.
cmd_desc_auto_flows_get_flow: Get the YAML definition of a specific flow by ID.
cmd_desc_auto_flows_create_flow_from_nlp: Compile a natural-language description into a YAML flow and save it.
cmd_desc_auto_flows_run_flow: Immediately execute a flow by ID.
cmd_desc_auto_flows_enable_flow: Enable a flow (will be triggered by its scheduler).
cmd_desc_auto_flows_disable_flow: Disable a flow without deleting it.
cmd_desc_auto_flows_get_action_catalog: List all registered actions available for use in flows.
cmd_desc_auto_help_list_capabilities: Displays the complete list of all tools, modules, and capabilities currently loaded in the system.
cmd_desc_auto_help_refresh_registry: Forces a re-read and update of the central capabilities registry (rescans plugins).
cmd_desc_auto_memory_read_history: Extract the last N saved messages from the database history.
cmd_desc_auto_memory_remember_info: Save important information about the user in the biographical profile.
cmd_desc_auto_memory_reset_memory: Execute the Tabula Rasa protocol: clear the entire episodic chat history.
cmd_desc_auto_memory_who_am_i: Ask Hecos to retrieve identity data for the Admin and the AI (context profile).
cmd_desc_auto_memory_rag_search: Perform a semantic search in the long-term vector memory (RAG knowledge base).
cmd_desc_auto_memory_rag_store: Store a piece of information permanently in the vector knowledge base.
cmd_desc_auto_memory_rag_ingest_file: Ingest a local file (.txt, .md, .pdf) into the vector knowledge base.
cmd_desc_auto_models_get_current_backend: Returns the AI backend currently in use (e.g., cloud, ollama, kobold).
cmd_desc_auto_models_list_models: Lists all available models for the currently selected backend.
cmd_desc_auto_models_set_model: Sets a new active AI model based on the numeric index obtained from list_models.
cmd_desc_auto_personality_list_souls: Lists all personalities (souls) currently available in the system.
cmd_desc_auto_personality_switch_soul: Switches the active personality. Accepts exact name (e.g., "Motoko") or numeric index.
cmd_desc_switch_soul: Switches the active soul (personality) of the system
cmd_desc_auto_sys_net_get_network_info: Runs ipconfig to extract local IPv4, Subnet, Default Gateway, and active DNS servers.
cmd_desc_auto_sys_net_get_proxy_status: Reports the current proxy configuration status in Hecos, including the URL and whether it is active.
cmd_desc_auto_sys_net_get_public_ip: Interrogates an external service to find the current public outbound IP address.
cmd_desc_auto_sys_net_ping_test: Executes a network ping test to the specified target (IP or domain).
cmd_desc_auto_sys_net_reset_dns: Restores the DNS configuration of the active network adapter back to DHCP (automatic).
cmd_desc_auto_sys_net_scan_local_network: Executes an ARP scan ('arp -a') to discover active devices connected to the same LAN.
cmd_desc_auto_sys_net_set_dns_servers: Changes the DNS servers of the active network adapter to bypass ISP level blocking.
cmd_desc_auto_sys_net_traceroute: Performs a traceroute to show the network path and hop-by-hop latency to a host.
cmd_desc_auto_sys_net_check_internet_spe: Tests download/upload internet speed using speedtest-cli or a CDN fallback.
cmd_desc_auto_sys_net_test_proxy: Tests the configured Proxy by attempting to reach an external service and reports the visible IP.
cmd_desc_auto_web_ui_get_panel_url: Returns the URL of the chat interface.
cmd_desc_auto_web_ui_open_browser: Opens the Hecos web interface in the default browser if not already open.
cmd_desc_auto_calendar_delete_event: Deletes a calendar event by ID.
cmd_desc_auto_calendar_get_date_info: Returns today's date formatted natively, current holidays, and upcoming public holidays.
cmd_desc_auto_calendar_list_events: Returns a formatted list of upcoming calendar events.
cmd_desc_auto_calendar_sync_calendars: Manually triggers synchronization with external Google/Apple calendars.
cmd_desc_calendar: Lists upcoming events in the calendar
cmd_desc_auto_contacts_find_contact: Finds a contact by name, phone, email or tag.
cmd_desc_auto_contacts_update_contact: Updates fields of an existing contact.
cmd_desc_auto_contacts_delete_contact: Deletes a contact by name or ID.
cmd_desc_auto_contacts_list_contacts: Lists contacts, optionally filtered by tag or query.
cmd_desc_auto_contacts_send_whatsapp_to_: Sends a WhatsApp message to a contact via the Messenger plugin.
cmd_desc_auto_drive_/drive: Opens the File Manager in the browser
cmd_desc_auto_image_gen_generate_image: Generates an image from a text description. Uses the configured provider.
cmd_desc_img: Generates an AI image from a text description
cmd_desc_auto_lists_list_lists: Shows all active lists with item count.
cmd_desc_auto_lists_show_list: Shows all items of a specific list.
cmd_desc_auto_lists_add_to_list: Adds one or more items to a list. Creates the list if it doesn't exist.
cmd_desc_auto_lists_check_item: Marks an item as completed in a list.
cmd_desc_auto_lists_remove_from_list: Permanently deletes an item from a list.
cmd_desc_auto_lists_clear_done: Removes all completed items from a list.
cmd_desc_auto_lists_archive_list: Archives a list (hides it from the main view).
cmd_desc_auto_mail_send_email: Sends an email to one or more recipients.
cmd_desc_auto_mail_read_inbox: Reads messages from a mail folder (inbox, sent, drafts, trash).
cmd_desc_auto_mail_search_emails: Searches emails by keyword, sender or subject.
cmd_desc_auto_mail_forward_email: Forwards an email to other recipients.
cmd_desc_auto_mail_move_email: Moves an email to another folder.
cmd_desc_auto_mail_sync_inbox: Forces a sync/refresh of the inbox.
cmd_desc_auto_mail_get_email_addresses_f: Returns email addresses of a contact from the address book.
cmd_desc_auto_map_get_home_location: Get lat/lon coordinates of the user's home location
cmd_desc_auto_map_geocode: Geocodes an address or city into lat/lon coordinates
cmd_desc_auto_media_player_add_to_playli: Add a file to an existing playlist (creates it if missing).
cmd_desc_auto_media_player_create_playli: Create a named playlist with a list of file paths.
cmd_desc_auto_media_player_get_playlist: Show the contents of a saved playlist.
cmd_desc_auto_media_player_get_status: Return the current playback status (track name, position, volume).
cmd_desc_auto_media_player_list_playlist: List all saved playlists with their track count.
cmd_desc_auto_media_player_next_track: Skip to the next track in the current queue.
cmd_desc_auto_media_player_pause: Pause or resume the current track.
cmd_desc_auto_media_player_play: Play a media file or URL.
cmd_desc_auto_media_player_play_by_index: Jump directly to a track by position in the current queue (0-based).
cmd_desc_auto_media_player_play_playlist: Load and play a saved playlist.
cmd_desc_auto_media_player_prev_track: Go back to the previous track in the current queue.
cmd_desc_auto_media_player_remove_from_p: Remove a track from a playlist by its position (1-based).
cmd_desc_auto_media_player_scan_folder: Scan a folder for audio/video files and optionally save as a playlist.
cmd_desc_auto_messenger_check_connection: Test the connection to one or all messaging providers.
cmd_desc_auto_messenger_force_send: Force-send by simulating an 'Enter' keystroke. Useful if WhatsApp Web gets stuck.
cmd_desc_auto_messenger_list_accounts: List all configured messaging providers and their status.
cmd_desc_auto_messenger_send_message: Send a message to a contact or channel.
cmd_desc_auto_reminder_cancel_reminder: Cancels an active reminder by its ID (full or first-8-chars prefix).
cmd_desc_auto_reminder_list_reminders: Lists all active reminders with their scheduled time and ID.
cmd_desc_auto_reminder_parse_and_set_rem: Helper for HDCS (Direct Commands). Parses a raw string like 'chiamare Marco alle 18:30 --interactive'
cmd_desc_auto_reminder_set_reminder: Creates a new reminder. Fires a TTS alert and WebUI notification when due.
cmd_desc_auto_reminder_snooze_reminder: Postpones a reminder by the specified number of minutes from now.
cmd_desc_auto_reminder_stop_audio: Signals the notifier to stop any currently playing or looping audio.
cmd_desc_auto_templates_render_template: Render a template by replacing its variables and combining header/body/footer.
cmd_desc_auto_users_get_profile: Gets full profile details (email, phone, etc.)
cmd_desc_auto_weather_get_current_weathe: Get the current weather conditions for a specific city.
cmd_desc_auto_weather_get_weather_data: Fetches unified weather block for the Frontend Widget and Backend Tools.
cmd_desc_auto_weather_get_weather_foreca: Get the daily weather forecast for the next 7 days for a specific city.
cmd_desc_auto_webcam_take_snapshot: Takes a photo. Use target='server' for PC webcam, target='client' for the user's own phone or browser.
cmd_desc_auto_webcam_desktop_screenshot: Captures the entire desktop screen (or a specific monitor) and saves it as an image file for visual analysis.
